parameters.content: ## Criar Tabelas no banco de dados

parameters.query:
-- CriaÃ§Ã£o da tabela adcreative
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_ad_creatives (
    id bigint PRIMARY KEY,  -- ID Ãºnico do post
    name TEXT,  -- Nome do post
    account_id bigint NOT NULL,  -- ID da conta associada
    actor_id bigint NOT NULL,  -- ID do ator que publicou
    instagram_user_id bigint NULL,  -- ID do usuÃ¡rio do Instagram
    instagram_permalink_url TEXT,  -- URL do post no Instagram
    effective_instagram_media_id bigint,  -- ID da mÃ­dia no Instagram
    call_to_action_type VARCHAR(50),  -- Tipo de call-to-action (ex: LEARN_MORE)
    object_type VARCHAR(50),  -- Tipo do objeto (ex: VIDEO, SHARE)
    status VARCHAR(20),  -- Status do post (ex: ACTIVE)
    thumbnail_url TEXT,  -- URL da thumbnail
    thumbnail_id bigint,  -- ID da thumbnail
    title VARCHAR(500),  -- TÃ­tulo do post
    video_id bigint,  -- ID do vÃ­deo (se for um post de vÃ­deo)
    image_url TEXT,  -- URL da imagem (se for um post de imagem)
    body TEXT NOT NULL  -- ConteÃºdo do post
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_ads (
    ad_id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    campaign_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    adset_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    preview_shareable_link TEXT,
    creative_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    issues_level VARCHAR(50),
    issues_error_code INT,
    issues_error_summary TEXT,
    issues_error_message TEXT,
    issues_error_type VARCHAR(50)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_ad_accounts (
    act_account_id VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY,         -- ID da conta (chave primÃ¡ria)
    name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,         -- Nome da conta
    account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,    -- ID da conta (pode ser usado para relacionamentos)
    account_status INT NOT NULL,        -- Status numÃ©rico da conta
    account_status_name VARCHAR(50),    -- Nome do status da conta
    age FLOAT,                  -- Idade da conta (com precisÃ£o decimal)
    business_name VARCHAR(255),         -- Nome do negÃ³cio
    currency VARCHAR(10),               -- Moeda usada na conta
    is_prepay_account varchar(5),          -- Indica se Ã© uma conta prÃ©-paga
    owner VARCHAR(50),                  -- ID do dono da conta
    timezone_name VARCHAR(100),         -- Fuso horÃ¡rio da conta
    amount_spent FLOAT,         -- Quantia gasta (convertido para decimal)
    balance FLOAT,              -- Saldo da conta
    spend_cap FLOAT             -- Limite de gastos
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_custom_conversions (
    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,  -- ID Ãºnico do evento
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,  -- Nome do evento
    name_normalize VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,  -- Nome do evento
    is_unavailable varchar(5) NOT NULL,  -- Indica se estÃ¡ indisponÃ­vel
    is_archived varchar(5) NOT NULL,  -- Indica se estÃ¡ arquivado
    custom_event_type VARCHAR(255), -- Tipo de evento (limitado a 'OTHER' conforme os dados fornecidos)
	`rule` TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
	`description` VARCHAR(255) NULL,
	`data_sources` VARCHAR(255) NULL,
	`event_source_type` VARCHAR(100) NULL,
	`pixel` VARCHAR(100) NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;


-- CriaÃ§Ã£o da tabela facebook_ads_performance
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_ads_performance (
    `date` DATE NOT NULL,
    account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	`act_account_id` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    campaign_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    adset_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    ad_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	
    objective VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
	optimization_goal VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
	
    spend FLOAT NOT NULL,
    impressions INT NOT NULL,
    clicks_all INT NOT NULL, -- clicks
    reach INT NOT NULL,
    unique_clicks INT NOT NULL,
    link_click INT NOT NULL, -- actions_link_click
    landing_page_view INT NOT NULL, -- actions_landing_page_view
	
	publisher_platform VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
	platform_position VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
	device_platform VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
	impression_device VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
	
    page_engagement INT NOT NULL, -- actions_page_engagement
    post_engagement INT NOT NULL, -- actions_post_engagement
    post_save INT NOT NULL, -- actions_onsite_conversion.post_save
    post_reaction INT NOT NULL, -- actions_post_reaction
    post_comment INT NOT NULL, -- actions_comment
    post INT NOT NULL, -- actions_post
	post_like INT NOT NULL, -- actions_like

	
    messaging_total INT NOT NULL, -- actions_onsite_conversion.total_messaging_connection
    messaging_conversation_started_7d INT NOT NULL,-- actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_conversation_started_7d
    messaging_block INT NOT NULL,-- actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_block
	messaging_first_reply INT NOT NULL,-- actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_first_reply
	messaging_2_message_send INT NOT NULL, -- actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_user_depth_2_message_send
	messaging_3_message_send INT NOT NULL, -- actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_user_depth_3_message_send
	messaging_5_message_send INT NOT NULL, -- actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_user_depth_5_message_send

	
	contact INT NOT NULL, -- contact_total
	initiate_checkout INT NOT NULL, -- actions_initiate_checkout
	initiate_checkout_value INT NOT NULL, -- action_values_initiate_checkout
	`lead` INT NOT NULL, -- actions_lead
	purchase INT NOT NULL, -- actions_purchase
	purchase_value INT NOT NULL, -- action_values_purchase
	add_to_cart INT NOT NULL, -- action_add_to_cart
	add_to_cart_value INT NOT NULL, -- action_values_add_to_cart
	complete_registration INT NOT NULL, -- actions_complete_registration
	view_content INT NOT NULL, -- actions_view_content
	subscriptions INT NOT NULL, -- actions_subscriptions
	schedule INT NOT NULL, -- actions_schedule

	
    video_avg_time_watched FLOAT NOT NULL,
    video_p25_watched INT NOT NULL,
    video_p50_watched INT NOT NULL,
    video_p75_watched INT NOT NULL,
    video_p95_watched INT NOT NULL,
    video_p100_watched INT NOT NULL,
    video_play INT NOT NULL,
    video_view INT NOT NULL -- actions_video_view
	
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_ad_sets (
    adset_id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    adset_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
	act_account_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    campaign_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_time DATETIME NOT NULL,
    start_time DATETIME NOT NULL,
    end_time DATETIME NULL,
    billing_event VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    budget_remaining FLOAT NOT NULL,
    daily_budget FLOAT NULL,
    destination_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    is_dynamic_creative varchar(5) NOT NULL,
    effective_status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    optimization_goal VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    learning_attribution_windows VARCHAR(255) NULL,
    learning_conversions INT NULL,
    learning_last_sig_edit_ts BIGINT NULL,
    learning_status VARCHAR(50) NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_campaigns (
    campaign_id BIGINT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,  -- ID Ãºnico da campanha
    campaign_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,               -- Nome da campanha
    account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,      -- ID da conta associada
    act_account_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,      -- ID da conta associada
    created_time DATETIME NOT NULL,           -- Data e hora de criaÃ§Ã£o da campanha
    start_time DATETIME NOT NULL,             -- Data e hora de inÃ­cio da campanha
    stop_time DATETIME NULL,
    updated_time DATETIME NOT NULL,
    budget_remaining FLOAT DEFAULT 0, -- OrÃ§amento restante da campanha
    daily_budget FLOAT DEFAULT 0,     -- OrÃ§amento diÃ¡rio da campanha
	lifetime_budget FLOAT DEFAULT 0,
    effective_status VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, -- Status da campanha
    pacing_type VARCHAR(100) NULL,                 -- Tipo de ritmo da campanha
    topline_id BIGINT NULL,              -- ID de referÃªncia para relatÃ³rios
	bid_strategy VARCHAR(50) NULL,
	objective VARCHAR(50) NULL,
	primary_attribution VARCHAR(50) NULL,
	special_ad_category VARCHAR(50) NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

COMMIT;
